stackRefinements.shared: TypeScript library with zod schema validation

ordering.note: shared is consumed by ui and api via runtime dependencies; in cross-layer tasks shared changes first, then ui/api. db has no internal edges in or out, so it carries no ordering constraint from manifests. Caller derives blueprint dispatch_rules.dispatch_order from internalEdges via deriveDispatchOrder.

gaps: db is a layer but no other layer declares a dependency on it (api does not depend on db in its manifest), and no source imports of db were found; the db layer is unreferenced — confirm whether api is intended to consume db and whether the edge is missing from manifests.
Internal edges use bare package-name matching ("shared": "*") rather than workspace:* protocol — relies on npm workspaces resolution; intent confirmed by root package.json workspaces globs.
